creator: jinking.this@gmail.com
text:
The newly-released FreeBSD-14.0-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso does not work in Ventoy, got a kernel panic at kern loading time.
The previouse version FreeBSD-13.2-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso works great when put into Ventoy of the same version.
The sha512sum of FreeBSD-14.0-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso is 1620a5061e987f55d2d8d94997ae4a0d4da1de25dc62cb5220d961a391533f3feca7ea2fe901f3275781aa307cc07ba22b97780a0f77e1537b62ab0fe9588df2 .
Please see panic stack backtrace at the attachment picture.
